title: Advance directive documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting that advance care planning was offered or completed, who was involved with consent, the person’s stated preferences, and where the plan is available, with capacity and legal context kept clinician-led.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports advance-care planning, involvement, preferences and record context for advance directive documentation; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting that advance care planning was offered or completed, who was involved with consent, the person’s stated preferences, and where the plan is available, with capacity and legal context kept clinician-led.

source.title: End of life care for adults: service delivery — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.6.1–1.6.7 — advance care planning and involvement

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting clinician-completed review of changing health and social needs, preferences, and advance plans at transitions without generating a care decision.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports review of recorded needs, preferences and advance plans for advance directive documentation; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting clinician-completed review of changing health and social needs, preferences, and advance plans at transitions without generating a care decision.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Person, capacity, participants, goals, values, preferences, treatments discussed, surrogate, document location, signatures and review plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for advance directive documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
